source_jobs.title: Senior Business Analyst - Inventory
source_jobs.description:
About Kiwi.com



Kiwi.com is a leading global travel-tech company headquartered in the Czech Republic. Our innovative algorithm enables users to find better route options and prices other search engines can’t see, daily performing billions of price checks across 95% of global flight content. Are you bold, bright and curious? Join a global business that’s still got a start-up heart.



About our Inventory Team



The Inventory team at Kiwi.com is responsible for ensuring that our users find the search results they are looking for, at the right price by acquiring comprehensive, accurate, and competitive flight content. Our Inventory analytics and experimentation team focuses on delivering insights and identifying new opportunities for improvement through leveraging market, trading and internal performance data.





What you will do

 - Own the fix for missed opportunities by taking the lead to identify gaps and bringing together lean, cross-functional teams to build lasting, effective solutions.

 - By diving into key performance indicators (KPIs), you will uncover insights that help shape smart business decisions, balancing performance, cost, and revenue growth.

 - Design intuitive and visually engaging self-service dashboards, turning complex datasets into accessible, actionable tools for our stakeholders.

 - Your expertise will bring business cases to life, helping to assess the impact of product innovations and partnerships through clear ROI calculations.

 - You will champion efficiency by streamlining and automating data processes, ensuring your team can focus on what truly matters.

 - You will work in an AI-native environment, using AI agents independently to accelerate analysis, automate workflows and improve decision-making, while also collaborating with teams to design and build agent-based solutions.





What you will need

 - Your previous significant experience in a business analytics role, with a proven track record of turning data into rapid, impactful business decisions.

 - Your demonstrated ability to manipulate large datasets, solve complex challenges, and uncover the root causes behind the numbers by deeply understanding business and product dynamics.

 - A knack for data visualization, using tools like Looker, Tableau, or Qlik to build clarity and bring insights to life for diverse audiences.

 - Your hands-on experience with SQL and Google Cloud tools, leveraging modern data infrastructure to make data work seamlessly for your team.

 - Your ability to work confidently with AI agents, using them to improve your own productivity, challenge your thinking and scale analytical work – while also collaborating with technical and business teams to shape practical agent-based solutions.

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in the English language, with the ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for a variety of audiences.

 - Previous experience in aviation or travel tech is a plus, but your curiosity, technical confidence and hunger for solving complex problems matter most







We offer you

 - We offer a hybrid and flexible work environment. A lovely, modern office in the center of Barcelona (Passeig de Gracia) with great views and amenities.

 - Monthly entitlement of 200 Euro redeemable through Cobee. Cobee is a benefits platform offering a range of benefits (meals, transport, nursery, health insurance, and physical wellness) and flexible compensation. It also allows our employees to allocate up to 30% of their gross salary to the consumption of certain products or services, leveraging tax exemption.

 - We also enjoy benefits, such as flexible working hours, 30 paid vacation days and sick days.

 - Annual financial bonus based on company and individual performance.

 - Flight vouchers to celebrate your Kiwi anniversaries.

 - Relocation package (including visa transfer support).

 - Dogs are welcome in our offices.





Interested? Join us and help us make trave

 - Your previous significant experience in a business analytics role, with a proven track record of turning data into rapid, impactful business decisions.

 - Your demonstrated ability to manipulate large datasets, solve complex challenges, and uncover the root causes behind the numbers by deeply understanding business and product dynamics.

 - A knack for data visualization, using tools like Looker, Tableau, or Qlik to build clarity and bring insights to life for diverse audiences.

 - Your hands-on experience with SQL and Google Cloud tools, leveraging modern data infrastructure to make data work seamlessly for your team.

 - Your ability to work confidently with AI agents, using them to improve your own productivity, challenge your thinking and scale analytical work – while also collaborating with technical and business teams to shape practical agent-based solutions.

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in the English language, with the ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for a variety of audiences.

 - Previous experience in aviation or travel tech is a plus, but your curiosity, technical confidence and hunger for solving complex problems matter most







We offer you

 - We give our employees the freedom to choose between the environment of work from home and our office in Prague, situated in the heart of the Karlin district with an in-house gym, sleeping spots, canteen, showers, chillout zones, and free refreshments.

 - We enjoy benefits, such as meal vouchers, 25 days of paid vacation, Cafeteria, sick days, VIP Medical Care, Multisport card, Makro Cash & Carry Card, Employee Assistance Program, and career development framework.

 - Annual financial bonus based on company and individual performance.

 - Relocation package (including visa transfer support).

 - We're rewarding Kiwis with flight vouchers to celebrate their Kiwi anniversaries.

 - Grow.Kiwi program which supports parents and keeps them engaged with the company.

 - Dogs are welcome in our offices.
   
    





Interested? Join us and help us make travel more accessible to all

source_jobs.title: AI Engineer - Fintech
source_jobs.description:
About Kiwi.com

 

Kiwi.com is a leading global travel-tech company headquartered in the Czech Republic. Our innovative algorithm enables users to find better route options and prices other search engines can’t see, daily performing billions of price checks across 95% of global flight content. Are you bold, bright and curious? Join a global business that’s still got a start-up heart.

 

About our Fintech Team

 

In Fintech, we are responsible for all the monetary flows within Kiwi.com. A team of developers, payment specialists, business & data analysts and product magicians inside Kiwi.com. We are charged with building the pillars of everything directly or indirectly related to payments at Kiwi.com. Payments from our customers, payments to airlines and to travel agencies, carefully preventing fraudulent behavior and ensuring the financial safety of our customers - our impact makes it safer for you to travel!

 
 

What you will do

 - Cooperate on designing and building a new generation of high-impact tools, sharing insights and using AI to increase the overall efficiency.

 - Support the end-to-end quality of our code by responsibly running robust unit, integration, manual, and automated testing to ensure collective success.

 - Navigate the complexities of payment systems with a detailed approach, understanding the challenges of payment processes while mindfully mitigating security risks.

 - Partner closely with product and business metrics to think beyond the codebase, bringing a shared curiosity to understand real-world traveler needs and ensure our technical solutions truly care for our users.

 - Nurture close collaboration with our dedicated FinTech specialists and connect openly with third-party service providers to deliver reliable, high-quality features together.

 - Dive deep into the world of global payments, masterfully sharing knowledge on how virtual credit cards, alternative payment methods (Apple Pay, Revolut), and 3DS authentication operate.

 - Understand and decode fraudulent behavior, expanding your expertise in cutting-edge fraud detection systems to protect our community and platform.

 - Uncover the shared logic behind financial reconciliation, learning exactly why it serves as a critical, supportive foundation for our long-term stability and business health.

 
 

What you will need

 - Your hands-on experience and drive to inherently use AI (Cursor or Claude Code) to eliminate manual development steps and accelerate your daily impact.

 - Your strong analytical mindset and ability to evaluate multiple technical paths, navigate complex payment processes, and mitigate potential security risks.

 - You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills, ensuring clear and empathetic collaboration within lean, high-talent teams.

 - You have a proven track record of debugging complex issues and driving long-term, sustainable technical fixes.

 - You are fluent in Python and enjoy working with clean, stable, and maintainable code bases.

 - Hands-on experience with relational databases—mainly PostgreSQL and Redis—along with a data-driven familiarity with BigQuery.

 - Your solid knowledge of object-oriented design patterns, microservices architecture, REST principles, and asynchronous messaging systems like PubSub.

 - You have a proven track record of sharing responsibility for deployment flows, showing a commitment to team success by collaborating on how we safely manage, nurture, and maintain our cloud infrastructure.

 
 
 

We offer you

 - We give our employees the freedom to choose between the environment of work from home and our office in Prague, situated in the heart of the Karlin district with an in-house gym, sleeping spots, canteen, showers, chillout zones, and free refreshments.

 - We enjoy benefits, such as meal vouchers, 25 days of paid vacation, Cafeteria, sick days, VIP Medical Care, Multisport card, Makro Cash & Carry Card, Employee Assistance Program, and c

notes: Multiple identical postings for the same role, indicating possible reposting or duplicate job listings.
